mission.title: Activate Reality Upload → NBA → Mission → Outcome Loop
mission.objective: Make CYVX convert uploaded operational reality into a verified next best action, executable mission, expected outcome, and evidence trail.

route: Extract constraints, risks, opportunities, and signals
